debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM✝ hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
inst✝ : G.EdgeFinite
⊢ EdgeFinite (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM')

failed_attempts:
apply Subgraph.edgeFinite
  apply Set.edgeFinite.symmDiff
  exact inferInstance
  exact inferInstance

refine ⟨Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_symmDiff (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM.subset)
    (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM'.subset)) ?_⟩
  intro e he
  simp only [restrict₂, Subtype.mem_mk, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_compl_iff,
    symmDiff_eq_union_diff_inter, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_inter_iff,
    Set.mem_compl_iff] at he
  tauto

refine ⟨Set.encard_finite.2 ?_⟩
  have : (M ∆ M').encard ≤ M.encard + M'.encard := by
    rw [symmDiff_encard_le]
  exact (Set.encard_finite.1 inst✝.finite).add (Set.encard_finite.1 inst✝.finite) |>.le.2 this

refine ⟨Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_symmDiff (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM.subset)
    (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM'.subset)) ?_⟩
  intro e he
  simp only [restrict₂, Subtype.mem_mk, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_compl_iff,
    symmDiff_eq_union_diff_inter, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_inter_iff,
    Set.mem_compl_iff] at he
  tauto

refine ⟨Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_symmDiff (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM.subset)
    (Set.finite_subset G.edgeFinite.1 hM'.subset)) ?_⟩
  intro e he
  simp only [restrict₂, Subtype.mem_setOf_eq, symmDiff, Set.mem_inter_iff,
    Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_sep_iff] at he
  tauto

apply Subgraph.edgeFinite
  apply Set.Finite.symmDiff
  exact Set.Finite.subset G.finiteEdges hM.subset
  exact Set.Finite.subset G.finiteEdges hM'.subset

have : (M ∆ M').Finite := by
    apply Set.Finite.symmDiff
    · exact Set.Finite.of_encard_ne_top (by simpa using hM.subset.encard_ne_top)
    · exact Set.Finite.of_encard_ne_top (by simpa using hM'.subset.encard_ne_top)
  infer_instance
